# Aura Fitness Studio

> Dubai's premier ladies-only boutique fitness studio in Umm Suqeim.

## About
Aura Fitness Studio is a boutique ladies-only fitness studio located in Umm Suqeim, Dubai. Established in 2019, we offer Pilates Reformer, Yoga Flow, HIIT Sculpt, and Personal Training classes.

## Classes
- Pilates Reformer — 55 min — AED 120
- Yoga Flow — 60 min — AED 95
- HIIT Sculpt — 45 min — AED 80
- Personal Training — 60 min — AED 350

## Hours
- Monday–Saturday: 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Friday: 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Contact
- Location: Umm Suqeim, Dubai, UAE
- Email: hello@aurafitness.ae
- WhatsApp: +971XXXXXXXXX
- Website: https://aura-fitness.vercel.app
